property.name: sun.boot.class.path

property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-8.0.472.8-hotspot\jre\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\weidxu\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\local\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\weidxu\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-8.0.472.8-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SDKs\Azure\CLI2\wbin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-25.0.1.8-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\gradle-9.2.1\bin;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI;C:\ProgramData\anaconda3;C:\ProgramData\anaconda3\Scripts;C:\Program Files\WezTerm;C:\Users\weidxu\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\weidxu\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\weidxu\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\weidxu\.dotnet\tools;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\vendor_perl;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\core_perl;.
